channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump lands in China for Xi summit with Nvidia CEO in tow
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump arrives in Beijing for talks with China’s Xi on Iran war, trade and US arms sales to Taiwan

- Trump-Xi summit live: US, China leaders to hold talks on trade, tech, Iran
- Xi and Trump to sit down for far-reaching talks on China-US ties and global shocks

- Trump, Xi set for Beijing talks with trade truce, Iran war at stake
- Trump-Xi summit: Trade truce at stake as Iran conflict looms over talks
